title: App Crashes on Launch
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 11.

title: Unable to Login
description: I can't login to my account; it says 'invalid credentials' even though my password is correct.

title: Billing Error on Payment
description: I was charged twice for my subscription this month.

title: Refund Not Received
description: I requested a refund for my purchase last week but haven't received it yet.

title: Missing Order in App
description: I placed an order yesterday, but it doesn't appear in my order history.

title: Cannot Update Profile
description: Unable to change my profile picture or update my name in the account settings.

title: App Freezes During Checkout
description: The app freezes when I try to complete a purchase.

title: Payment Method Not Working
description: My saved credit card is declined even though it has sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Reset Password
description: The reset password link I received does not work.

title: Account Suspended
description: My account was suspended without any notification.

title: App Notifications Not Working
description: I don't receive notifications for new messages or alerts.

title: Subscription Auto-Renew Failed
description: My subscription did not renew automatically, and I lost premium features.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: I was charged $20 instead of $10 for my last purchase.

title: Order Delivered But Not Shown in App
description: My order shows as delivered but it’s not listed in my order history.

title: Refund Issue With Subscription
description: I canceled my subscription but the refund hasn’t been processed yet.
